title: [ImportVerilog] Support using string variables as arguments of $display
body: Fixes import of `$display` when there is no leading format string literal and an argument has the string type (like `test[i]` from `string test [4]`). Previously, those arguments were routed through default integer formatting, which called `convertToSimpleBitVector` and failed with `cannot be cast to a simple bit vector` for `!moore.string`.
